utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six items explicitly. Each section appears to be fully specified: 
- property: includes description and price (complete)
- financing: includes solution type and detailed terms (complete)
- legal_services: includes service name and cost (complete)
- moving_services: includes service level and cost (complete)
- setup_services: includes utility package, cost, and inspection (complete)
- total_budget: includes detailed breakdown of all costs and total estimation (complete)
Thus, all 6 items are covered and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution describes a 2-bedroom, 95 sqm modern apartment priced at CAD $480,000 in Toronto. In the ground-truth ratings, this matches the 'New Build' purchase property (price CAD $480K, rating 10). The financing solution chosen is 'Mortgage' with 20% down payment and a CAD $1,200 fee, which corresponds to the 'Traditional Mortgage' (arrangement fee CAD $1,200, rating 8). The legal service listed is 'Basic Legal Package0'—this appears to be a slight naming error or variant of 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving service is 'Standard', which matches 'Standard Moving' (rating 9). The setup service is 'Premium (gas, electricity, water, internet, phone, smart meters)', which corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9). The property inspection cost is CAD $300, matching 'Basic Survey' (rating 9).
